The '''First Fleet''' of the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet]] was one of the main concentrations of Alliance warships during the latter portion of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|Yuuzhan Vong Invasion]]. It was formed out of the [[New Republic First Fleet|New Republic First Battle Group]].

Under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Traest Kre'fey]], the First Fleet was stationed at [[Dac/Legends|Dac]]. The First Fleet was a major component of the Alliance [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]].

[[40 ABY/Legends|A decade]] later, the First once again found itself on the front lines of conflict. Now under the command of [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Nek Bwua'tu]] aboard the ''[[Welmo Darb]]'', the First was combined with the [[Sixth Fleet]] and fought in the weeks-long [[Battle of Kuat (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Kuat]].

*''[[Ralroost]]'' (Kre'fey's flagship)
